Veriba — one app, two modes

Instagram-style discovery applied to the merged product, now with photographic placeholders, five-item navigation, and after-forward tiles (no corner chip). One Expo codebase; login role decides what renders.

Consumer mode Provider mode ↔ Shared: theme · auth · post/detail · verification
Consumer mode

Find a clinic you can trust

Home is discovery — an edge-to-edge mosaic of verified before/afters across clinics. One tile per row auto-reveals before → after on a loop; the rest lead with the after. Tap any tile to open the post. Five-tab bar with Inbox in the centre, where provider posts wait for the patient’s approval.

Consumer · 04
Review & approve
Consent tiers map to the existing data model: full / partial / blur / decline.
9:415G ▾ 100%
Your approval

How should your before & after appear?

Drag to preview exactly what the public will see. Your face can be masked — you’re in control.

BEFORE
AFTER
Eyes are masked in the “Blur” option below
Approve · show full photo
Most credible. Your full before & after appears in discovery.
Approve · blur my eyes
Identity protected, transformation still visible.
Partial · after only
Show the result; keep the before private.
Decline
Don’t publish. Stays private to the clinic record.
Confirm & sign approval

Provider mode

Capture · consent · publish

Same dense visual language, clinic-side. Five-tab bar with the ＋ create button centred. New Activity tab surfaces approval state; Messages holds patient replies.

Provider · 03
Create (＋)
Centre button. The existing capture → consent → publish wizard.
9:415G ▾ 100%
New session
New session

Capture, verify, consent, publish.

Every session is timestamped, hashed, and consent-locked from first capture through publish.

Workflow
1
Select the treatment performed.
2
Capture a baseline photo and progression shots.
3
Record consent & choose how the after photo is collected.
4
Send to the patient for in-app approval, then publish.
Start new session
Review existing sessions

The shared loop that ties both modes together

One event — a published case — surfaces on both sides. Matched to a patient by email: in-app if they have an account, web link if they don’t.

ProviderCapture + consent in wizard
→
ProviderSend for approval
→
ConsumerInbox: review & set privacy
→
ConsumerApprove / blur / decline
→
SharedPublished to discovery feed
Drag the white handle on any before/after to compare. Photos are placeholder portraits embedded in the file (self-contained); the “before” is the same image desaturated to stand in for a pre-treatment shot. Theme from src/theme.ts — copper #B5672D, teal #2D4F5E, Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans.
